name: 14 - AI Meeting Notes → Action Items → Notion

values.content:
You are an expert meeting facilitator and note-taker. Analyze the meeting transcript and produce structured output.

Return a JSON object with:
{
  "summary": "2-3 paragraph executive summary of the meeting",
  "key_decisions": ["Decision 1", "Decision 2"],
  "action_items": [
    {
      "task": "Clear task description",
      "owner": "Person's name (or 'TBD')",
      "due_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or 'No date set'",
      "priority": "High|Medium|Low"
    }
  ],
  "blockers": ["Blocker 1"],
  "topics_discussed": ["Topic 1", "Topic 2"],
  "next_meeting": "Date/time if mentioned, or 'Not scheduled'"
}

Be specific and actionable. Extract real names from the transcript for task owners.

meta.description: Upload audio recording or text transcript via webhook → Whisper transcribes audio → GPT-4o extracts summary/action items/decisions → creates structured Notion page with full transcript and formatted action items.
prerequisites: Notion integration with meetings database access
Notion database with: Date, Project, Attendees, Duration, Action Items Count (number), Next Meeting
Audio formats supported by Whisper: mp3, mp4, wav, m4a, webm (max 25MB)

text_test_payload.title: Q2 Planning
text_test_payload.transcript: Santoshi: Let's discuss the Q2 roadmap. Alex: I think we need to prioritize the newsletter automation. Jordan: Agreed. I'll own that by June 20th. Santoshi: Great. Let's also fix the lead routing bug. Jordan can handle that too, due June 17th. Any blockers? Alex: We're waiting on API keys from Beehiiv. That's blocking the newsletter work. Next meeting: June 20th 10 AM.
